productName: Rays - 7.5oz Hash Rosin Pineapple Lemonade - 100mg THC : 20mg CBD : 20mg CBG : 20mg CBN : 20mg CBC - DOH
description: A chef-inspired sweet-tart lemonade cannabis drink made for sipping cold, with bright flavor, a clean finish, and a smooth infused lift. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, CBG to support daytime focus and clarity, CBN to help you relax and ease into rest, and CBC to round out the full-plant entourage effect. Sip slowly and let the hybrid infusion settle in at its own pace.
